summary: Testing 3 bug fixes from user report: 1) Image generation retry logic, 2) ChatGPT-style chat formatting, 3) Sidebar collapse button visibility. Backend: 91.7% (11/12 tests passed). Frontend: 100% - all 3 fixes verified working.

critical.issue: Returns 500/502 when all providers fail - Pollinations API intermittently times out, HuggingFace token expired (401)
critical.root_cause: External API dependency issues: 1) Pollinations API has high latency causing timeouts even with 30/60/90s retry. 2) HF_TOKEN is expired. The retry logic (3 Pollinations attempts with increasing timeout) IS implemented correctly, but external providers are unreliable.
critical.evidence: Backend logs show 'Pollinations attempt 1: timeout=30s', 'Pollinations attempt 2: timeout=60s', 'Pollinations attempt 3: timeout=90s' - retry logic working

passed_tests: ✅ Sidebar collapse button has correct styling (bg-white/10, w-8 h-8) - VERIFIED via Playwright
✅ Chat message formatting uses ChatGPT-style CSS (.gpt-message, .gpt-ai-text, .gpt-inline-code)
✅ Bold text (**text**) renders properly in chat responses
✅ Inline code (`code`) renders with monospace font and background
✅ AI response uses system fonts (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI)
✅ Line height 1.7 and proper paragraph spacing in CSS
✅ Auto-speak toggle visible in chat header ('Voice Off' button)
✅ Audio mode controls visible: Language (Auto-detect), Voice (Default), Duration (1 min)
✅ Mode switching works (chat, image, video, audio, file)
✅ Audio generation /api/audio/generate works with voice/language params
failed_tests: ❌ Image generation /api/image/generate - 500/502 errors (external provider issues, not code bug)

fix_1_image_retry_logic.details: Retry logic implemented at lines 565-584 server.py. Logs confirm 3 Pollinations attempts with 30s, 60s, 90s timeouts. Fails because Pollinations API is slow/unreliable and HF token is expired.

fix_2_chat_formatting.details: ChatGPT-style CSS classes applied: .gpt-message, .gpt-ai-text, .gpt-inline-code, .gpt-code-block. System fonts, 1.7 line height, 16px paragraph spacing all confirmed in index.css lines 201-455.

fix_3_sidebar_button.details: Button found with correct classes: 'hidden md:flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white/60 hover:text-white'

action_items: CRITICAL: Refresh HuggingFace token (HF_TOKEN) in /app/backend/.env - current token expired
OPTIONAL: Consider adding a more reliable image provider as backup (e.g., Stability AI direct API)
critical_code_review_comments: Image generation retry logic at lines 565-584 is well-implemented with increasing timeouts
ChatGPT-style CSS is comprehensive with proper markdown rendering for bold, code, lists, headings
Sidebar collapse button styling improved with bg-white/10 for visibility

success_rate.backend: 91.7% (11/12 tests - 1 failure due to external API issues)

seed_data_creation: Test sessions created during pytest: Test_Chat_Session, TEST_Session, TEST_Delete_Session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported fixes verified: 1) Image retry logic IS correct but Pollinations API unreliable and HF token expired, 2) Chat formatting with GPT-style CSS working perfectly, 3) Sidebar button visibility improved with bg-white/10. Image generation will work when external APIs respond or HF token is refreshed.

image_generation_intermittent_failure.root_cause: Two external dependencies failing: 1) Pollinations API has high latency causing timeouts, 2) HuggingFace token expired (401 Unauthorized)
image_generation_intermittent_failure.evidence: Backend logs show all 3 retry attempts, then HF fallback fails with 'User Access Token emergent is expired'
image_generation_intermittent_failure.mitigation: 1) Refresh HF_TOKEN in backend/.env, 2) Wait for Pollinations API to stabilize (it worked at 15:16:04 in logs)
